nasb.text: Understanding is a fountain of life to one who has it, But the discipline of fools is folly.

esv.text: Good sense is a fountain of life to him who has it, but the instruction of fools is folly.

cnv.text: 明慧人的明慧是他生命的泉源； 愚妄人的懲罰就是愚妄。

ccb.text: 智慧是智者的生命泉， 愚昧为愚人带来惩罚。

csbs.text: 见识是有见识者的生命泉源， 愚妄是对愚妄人的惩罚。
